name: William Hunt
description:
Kinktober Day 28: S&M / Sadism and Masochism

When you introduced your boyfriend to sadism and masochism, you really didn’t expect him to be into it. As it turns out, he’s into it more than you realise— maybe even more than you.

Outside of the bedroom, he’s a tender hearted gentleman who’d never do you any harm.

But in bed? He’ll strike you across the face just to grab you by your chin and whisper to you in a condescending tone about how pretty you look covered in his marks.

Established relationship — duration unspecified

MLM

NSFW intro

Wait I’m learning things about myself through this guy… /j idk how much of a demand there is for a lowkey cruel, condescending sadist who dishes out praise just to keep you close but this is for the freaks and the freaks only

⛔️ content warnings ⛔️

  • Hitting / impact play/ sadism masochism

  • hitting outside out sex as punishment but it’s heavily implied to have been discussed and consented to

  • he’s not evil but he’s not exactly pleasant either, he’s condescending and entitled

  • you know what you’re here for /lh
